stages.objective: Observe blocked process progression back to runnable state.
stages.goal: Verify every blocked phase has a wakeup path.
stages.theory_detail: Liveness in blocking workloads requires eventual wakeup and scheduler service.

hints.concept: A blocked state is temporary only if wake conditions are met.
hints.explicit: Match each block with corresponding wakeup and resumed dispatch event.

stages.objective: Diagnose whether blocked progression reaches completion.
stages.goal: Pass liveness checks with required completion target.

hints.concept: Liveness proof requires eventual completion, not just wakeup visibility.
hints.explicit: Run until process exits and verify completion metric and trace requirements.

stages.objective: Tune device latencies and preserve liveness guarantees.
stages.goal: Apply bounded config edits while keeping blocked-progress checks passing.

hints.nudge: Use one latency tweak per attempt.
hints.concept: Latency affects timing but should not eliminate eventual progress.
hints.explicit: Apply one change, run full workload, and submit only if completion still passes.
